title: Google's Agentic Peer-Reviewer Handled ~10K Papers at ICML/STOC — Formal Research Paper Now Out [R]
summary: Google deployed an agentic AI peer-reviewer at two top CS conferences — reviewing ~10,000 papers with 30-minute turnaround — and the new formal research paper shows it catches 34% more mathematical errors than zero-shot prompting; the precedent for AI-automated scientific review at conference scale is set and now formally documented.--Source:https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28277submitted by/u/Justgototheeffinmoon[link][comments]
title_es: IA de Google revisa 10K papers en conferencias top con 34% menos errores
bajada: Google desplegó un revisor agentico de IA en ICML y STOC, revisando ~10,000 papers en 30 minutos cada uno y detectando 34% más errores matemáticos que prompting tradicional. El paper formaliza el precedente de revisión científica automatizada a escala.
bajada_en: Google deployed an agentic AI reviewer at ICML and STOC, handling ~10,000 papers with 30-minute turnaround and catching 34% more mathematical errors than zero-shot prompting. The research formalizes precedent for AI-automated scientific review at scale.

title: Open Models, Closed Environments: Palantir Brings Secure AI to US Agencies With NVIDIA Nemotron
summary: Showcasing the importance of open source innovation in American AI, Palantir’s new intelligent engine — introduced today — uses NVIDIA Nemotron open models to serve the needs of U.S. government agencies. Open source software has long been a pillar of U.S. technology leadership.  In 1969, DARPA connected four university computers — from UCLA, Stanford, UCSB […]
title_es: Palantir despliega modelos abiertos NVIDIA Nemotron en agencias estadounidenses
bajada: Palantir lanzó un nuevo motor inteligente basado en modelos abiertos NVIDIA Nemotron para servir a agencias del gobierno estadounidense. La iniciativa subraya la importancia de la innovación open source en la liderazgo tecnológico de EE.UU.
bajada_en: Palantir launched a new intelligent engine powered by NVIDIA Nemotron open models to serve U.S. government agencies. The initiative underscores the importance of open-source innovation in American technological leadership.

title: China’s Z.ai claims it can match Mythos on cybersecurity
summary: China's Zhipu AI (Z.ai) released its open-weight GLM-5.2, and some researchers have claimed that it matches Mythos in certain bug-finding and cybersecurity scenarios. While GLM lags behind models from Anthropic and OpenAI in other, more general tasks, it seems that China has dramatically reduced the gap in the capabilities between its models and those of […]
title_es: GLM-5.2 de China iguala capacidades de ciberseguridad con modelos occidentales
bajada: El modelo abierto GLM-5.2 de Zhipu AI demuestra que puede rivalizar con Mythos en tareas de búsqueda de bugs y ciberseguridad. Aunque GLM aún rezaga en otras tareas generales, China ha acortado significativamente la brecha con Anthropic y OpenAI.
bajada_en: Zhipu AI's open-weight GLM-5.2 demonstrates it can rival Mythos in bug-finding and cybersecurity tasks. While GLM still lags in general tasks, China has dramatically narrowed the gap with Anthropic and OpenAI.

title: Firefly Aerospace Operates NVIDIA Jetson in Lunar Orbit for the First Time
title_es: NVIDIA Jetson opera en órbita lunar por primera vez
bajada: Firefly Aerospace operó exitosamente NVIDIA Jetson en órbita lunar, demostrando la viabilidad del hardware edge computing en misiones espaciales. Este hito abre posibilidades para IA autónoma en exploraciones extraplanetarias.
bajada_en: Firefly Aerospace successfully operated NVIDIA Jetson in lunar orbit, proving edge computing hardware viability for space missions. This milestone opens possibilities for autonomous AI in extraplanetary exploration.

title: GLM 5.2 beats Claude in our benchmarks
summary: Article URL:https://semgrep.dev/blog/2026/we-have-mythos-at-home-glm-52-beats-claude-in-our-cyber-benchmarks/Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48709670Points: 1025# Comments: 471
title_es: GLM-5.2 supera a Claude en benchmarks de ciberseguridad
bajada: Según análisis de Semgrep, GLM-5.2 supera a Claude en benchmarks especializados de ciberseguridad. El resultado refuerza la evidencia de que modelos chinos están cerrando la brecha en dominios específicos.
bajada_en: According to Semgrep's analysis, GLM-5.2 outperforms Claude on specialized cybersecurity benchmarks. The result reinforces evidence that Chinese models are closing the gap in specific domains.

title: This Humanoid Robot Is a Terrifyingly Competent Office Intern
summary: Flexion Robotics, a startup founded by ex-Nvidia engineers, has a clever way of training robots to do useful work.
title_es: Flexion Robotics crea humanoides competentes para oficinas
bajada: Flexion Robotics, fundada por ex-ingenieros de NVIDIA, desarrolló un humanoides robótico capaz de realizar tareas de oficina útiles con entrenamiento inteligente. El avance representa progreso significativo en aplicaciones empresariales de robótica.
bajada_en: Flexion Robotics, founded by ex-NVIDIA engineers, developed a humanoid robot capable of performing useful office tasks through clever training methods. The advancement represents significant progress in enterprise robotics applications.

title: Cerebras OpenAI deal capacity has effectively killed the waitlist for everyone else [D]
summary: I’m pretty annoyed. We’re a small AI startup building a real-time coding agent. Our p95 latency requirements are tight (and self imposed, but thats the product). We need sustained high-throughput inference with ~1-2k tokens/second. Been on the Cerebras waitlist for months trying to get API access. We’re not doing training so don’t need a warehouse of H100s. We need fast, high-throughput ASIC inference for a specific production workload. Cerebras’ just went public and they basically have no compute how is that possible?Well turns out OpenAI and Cerebras for OpenAI to buy like $20b worth of these chips. This has effectively pre-allocated the vast majority of Cerebras’ near-term inference capacity to a single customer. I mean, none of us can compete with thatThe result is that this deal situation has made their API waitlist functionally infinite for anyone who isn’t a hyperscaler. Legit making me pull my hair out.submitted by/u/Kortopi-98[link][comments]
title_es: Acuerdo OpenAI-Cerebras coloca API en lista de espera infinita
bajada: El contrato de $20B entre OpenAI y Cerebras para chips de inferencia pre-asignó la mayoría de capacidad a OpenAI, dejando a startups pequeñas sin acceso viable. La situación ilustra cómo megadeals corporativos pueden fragmentar el ecosistema.
bajada_en: The $20B OpenAI-Cerebras chip deal pre-allocated most near-term inference capacity to OpenAI, effectively blocking smaller startups from API access. The situation illustrates how mega-deals can fragment the ecosystem.

title: AI boom risks global financial crash, warn central bankers
summary: Article URL:https://www.telegraph.co.uk/business/2026/06/28/ai-boom-risks-global-financial-crash-central-bankers-warn/Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48713697Points: 148# Comments: 184
title_es: Bancos centrales advierten sobre riesgo de crash financiero por IA
bajada: Autoridades monetarias centrales advirtieron que el boom de IA podría precipitar un crash financiero global si no se gestiona adecuadamente. La alerta subraya preocupaciones de reguladores sobre sostenibilidad del ciclo actual de inversión.
bajada_en: Central bankers warned that the AI boom risks triggering a global financial crash without proper management. The alert underscores regulator concerns about the sustainability of the current investment cycle.

title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.
title_es: HP expande su asociación estratégica con OpenAI
bajada: HP Inc. amplía su partnership Frontier con OpenAI para desplegar IA en experiencias de clientes, desarrollo de software y operaciones empresariales. La expansión señala una mayor adopción de soluciones OpenAI en el sector empresarial.
bajada_en: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations. The expansion signals broader enterprise adoption of OpenAI solutions.

title: Omen AI’s plan to optimize data centers is all wet
summary: Omen AI raised a $31 million Series A to monitor chip coolant and stop bacterial outbreaks in data centers.
title_es: Omen AI recauda $31M para optimizar centros de datos
bajada: Omen AI cerró una ronda Serie A por $31 millones para su plataforma que monitorea refrigerante de chips y previene brotes bacterianos en centros de datos. La solución aborda un problema operacional crítico en infraestructura de IA.
bajada_en: Omen AI closed a $31M Series A to scale its platform that monitors chip coolant and prevents bacterial outbreaks in data centers. The solution addresses a critical operational challenge in AI infrastructure.

title: Robot hand company settles Tesla trade secret suit and announces $11M raise
summary: The startup, Proception, is taking a unique approach to collecting training data to tackle one of the hardest problems in robotics: hands.
title_es: Proception resuelve demanda de Tesla y recauda $11M
bajada: Proception, startup de manos robóticas, resolvió una demanda de secretos comerciales con Tesla y completó una ronda de $11 millones. La compañía está enfocada en recolectar datos de entrenamiento para uno de los problemas más complejos en robótica.
bajada_en: Proception, a robot hand startup, settled a Tesla trade secret lawsuit and raised $11M. The company focuses on collecting training data for one of robotics' hardest problems.

title: Show HN: Bash4LLM+ – A lightweight, dependency-free Bash wrapper for LLM APIs
summary: Bash4LLM is a single-file Bash wrapper for interacting with LLMs from the terminal.  I created it because I wanted something simple that worked without installing Python, Node, or any other runtime.It uses only Bash, curl, and jq. You can send prompts, start a small chat, process files line by line, stream output, and save session metadata in JSON format.I tried to make it safe and predictable: no use of the system /tmp, no use of eval. Groq is supported by default, and other providers can be added with dedicated Bash scripts in the extras/providers/ folder.Example:echo "explains the command: ls -l" | ./bash4llmComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48710827Points: 54# Comments: 16
title_es: Bash4LLM+: wrapper ultralightweight para APIs de LLMs en terminal
bajada: Bash4LLM+ es un wrapper de Bash de un solo archivo para interactuar con LLMs desde terminal sin dependencias externas. La herramienta usa solo Bash, curl y jq, ideal para developers que necesitan soluciones minimalistas.
bajada_en: Bash4LLM+ is a single-file Bash wrapper for interacting with LLMs from terminal without external dependencies. The tool uses only Bash, curl, and jq, ideal for developers seeking minimal solutions.

title: I used Claude Code to get a second opinion on my MRI
summary: Article URL:https://antoine.fi/mri-analysis-using-claude-code-opusComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48708941Points: 525# Comments: 650
title_es: Claude Code análiza MRI: caso de uso médico emergente
bajada: Un developer utilizó Claude Code para obtener una segunda opinión sobre análisis de MRI, mostrando aplicaciones potenciales de modelos IA en diagnosticación médica. El caso destaca capacidades de visión y razonamiento de modelos avanzados.
bajada_en: A developer used Claude Code to get a second opinion on MRI analysis, showcasing potential medical diagnostic applications. The case highlights vision and reasoning capabilities of advanced models.

title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
summary: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.
title_es: OpenAI mapea oportunidades laborales de IA en Europa
bajada: OpenAI publicó un reporte que analiza cómo IA podría remodelar empleos en la UE, identificando ocupaciones con riesgo de automatización, crecimiento o cambios de flujo. El estudio proporciona datos para planificación de políticas europeas.
bajada_en: OpenAI published a report analyzing how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, identifying occupations facing automation, growth, or workflow changes. The study provides data for European policy planning.

title: Agent confidence on the technical frontier
summary: Enterprise investment in AI is booming. Gartner is calling 2026 an “inflection year” for organizations to align their AI projects with strategic business objectives. As the pressure to prove ROI mounts, executives and technology leaders are looking to agentic AI to drive the measurable financial outcomes their businesses seek. A prime opportunity for AI agents…
title_es: Ejecutivos buscan agentes IA para demostrar ROI en 2026
bajada: Gartner declara 2026 como año de inflexión para que organizaciones alineen proyectos de IA con objetivos estratégicos, y ejecutivos ven agentes IA como clave para resultados financieros medibles. El trend refleja maduración del mercado empresarial.
bajada_en: Gartner calls 2026 an inflection year for organizations to align AI projects with strategic objectives, with executives viewing agentic AI as key to measurable financial outcomes. The trend reflects enterprise market maturation.

title: Claude Meets Blackwell Ultra: Anthropic’s Models Now Run on NVIDIA GB300 in Azure
summary: Anthropic’s Claude models in Microsoft Foundry — hosted on Microsoft Azure and running on NVIDIA GB300 Blackwell Ultra GPUs — are now generally available, giving Azure-native enterprises a powerful new way to build autonomous and domain-specific AI agents. As agentic AI continues to drive enterprise innovation and becomes more autonomous, organizations need access to computing […]
title_es: Claude ahora corre en GPUs NVIDIA Blackwell en Azure
bajada: Anthropic y Microsoft hacen disponible Claude en la infraestructura GB300 Blackwell Ultra de NVIDIA en Azure. Empresas Azure-native ahora pueden construir agentes IA avanzados con mejor desempeño.
bajada_en: Anthropic and Microsoft make Claude available on NVIDIA's GB300 Blackwell Ultra infrastructure in Azure. Azure-native enterprises can now build advanced AI agents with improved performance.

title: South Korean tech giants commit over $550B to ease ‘RAMageddon’
summary: The world's two largest memory chip companies vow to build more memory lab fabs as South Korea positions itself as an AI tech powerhouse country.
title_es: Samsung y SK Hynix invierten $550B en memoria para IA
bajada: Los dos mayores fabricantes de chips de memoria de Corea del Sur comprometen inversión masiva para resolver la escasez de RAM en IA. Reconocen que la demanda de memoria es crítica para el boom de agentes IA.
bajada_en: South Korea's two largest memory chip makers commit massive investment to address RAM shortage in AI. They recognize that memory demand is critical for the AI agent boom.

title: Anthropic and Gov. Newsom forge deal allowing California government to use Claude at half price
summary: As Anthropic forges a closer relationship with the state of California, the federal government has made an enemy out of the OpenAI rival.
title_es: Anthropic negocia descuento del 50% para gobierno de California
bajada: Anthropic firma acuerdo con el gobernador Newsom para que California use Claude a precio reducido. Movimiento estratégico que posiciona a Anthropic en el sector público mientras genera tensiones federales.
bajada_en: Anthropic signs deal with Governor Newsom allowing California to use Claude at half price. Strategic move positioning Anthropic in the public sector while creating federal tensions.

title: Arena, the AI leaderboard everyone uses, is now a $100M business
summary: The startup, which runs a popular free AI leaderboard, launched its commercial service just last September.
title_es: Arena, el leaderboard de IA, llega a valoración de $100M
bajada: La startup que corre el popular leaderboard gratuito de IA alcanza $100M de valoración tras lanzar servicios comerciales hace 9 meses. Demuestra demanda de herramientas de evaluación especializadas.
bajada_en: The startup running the popular free AI leaderboard reaches $100M valuation after launching commercial services 9 months ago. Shows demand for specialized evaluation tools.

title: Lawmakers want to ban AI companies from selling your health data
summary: A new proposal would ban the sale of Americans' health and location information to data brokers - including information people reveal to an AI chatbot like ChatGPT or Claude. In the coming weeks, Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) and Representative Mary Gay Scanlon (D-PA) are planning to debut a new version of the Health and Location […]
title_es: Proponen prohibir venta de datos de salud a empresas IA
bajada: La senadora Elizabeth Warren y la representante Mary Gay Scanlon presentarán proyecto de ley para prohibir venta de datos de salud y ubicación a brokers, incluida información revelada a chatbots IA. Busca proteger privacidad en era de agentes.
bajada_en: Senator Elizabeth Warren and Rep. Mary Gay Scanlon will introduce a bill to ban sale of health and location data to brokers, including information revealed to AI chatbots. Aims to protect privacy in the agent era.

title: Meta Contractors Posed as Teens to Prompt Rival Chatbots About Suicide, Sex, and Drugs
summary: Hundreds of contractors working on a project for Meta pretended to be kids in order to see how other chatbots like Gemini and ChatGPT would respond to high-risk subjects, WIRED found.
title_es: Meta usó contratistas que se haciían pasar por adolescentes
bajada: Cientos de contratistas de Meta se fingieron menores para probar cómo Gemini, ChatGPT y otros chatbots responden a temas de alto riesgo. Revela prácticas de testing agresivas en competidores.
bajada_en: Hundreds of Meta contractors posed as minors to test how Gemini, ChatGPT and other chatbots respond to high-risk topics. Reveals aggressive testing practices on competitors.

title: DiScoFormer: One transformer for density and score, across distributions
title_es: DiScoFormer: un transformer para múltiples distribuciones
bajada: Allen AI presenta DiScoFormer, un modelo que unifica transformers para estimación de densidad y score across diferentes distribuciones. Avance de research que simplifica arquitecturas complejas.
bajada_en: Allen AI presents DiScoFormer, a model that unifies transformers for density and score estimation across different distributions. Research advance that simplifies complex architectures.

title: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users
summary: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your interests and data from connected Google apps.
title_es: Gemini genera imágenes personalizadas gratis en EE.UU.
bajada: Google expande la generación de imágenes con IA personalizada en Gemini a usuarios gratuitos en Estados Unidos. La herramienta usa datos de apps conectadas para crear imágenes basadas en intereses.
bajada_en: Google expands personalized AI image generation in Gemini to free users in the US. The tool uses connected app data to create images based on user interests.

title: Cursor now has a mobile app for guiding your coding agent on the go
summary: Cursor has launched a new mobile app for remote oversight over coding agents.
title_es: Cursor lanza app móvil para controlar coding agents
bajada: El editor de código IA Cursor presenta app móvil para supervisar agentes de código remotamente. Expande capacidades de control y monitoreo desde cualquier dispositivo.
bajada_en: AI code editor Cursor releases mobile app for remote oversight of coding agents. Expands monitoring and control capabilities from any device.

title: Tidal won’t pay royalties on AI-generated music but isn’t banning it outright
summary: Tidal shared its new policies regarding AI-generated music today and how the platform plans to "protect artists" and "inform listeners." Instead of banning it outright, starting on July 15th Tidal will label tracks it has identified as being 100 percent AI-generated with an icon. But starting today those tracks will no longer be monetizable. "Tidal's […]
title_es: Tidal etiqueta pero no monetiza música generada por IA
bajada: Tidal implementa nueva política: las canciones 100% generadas por IA serán etiquetadas y no monetizables desde el 15 de julio. Enfoque intermedio entre prohibición y libertad total.
bajada_en: Tidal implements new policy: 100% AI-generated tracks will be labeled and non-monetizable from July 15th. Middle-ground approach between outright ban and full freedom.

title: OpenAI is teasing new hardware… for Codex
summary: OpenAI is releasing some sort of device related to its AI-powered coding tool, Codex, on July 15th. In a video posted to X on Monday, OpenAI shows a square-shaped device with several buttons, alongside the caption, "Your favorite Codex shortcuts are getting an upgrade." This isn't the mysterious AI-powered device OpenAI is working on with […]
title_es: OpenAI anuncia dispositivo hardware para Codex
bajada: OpenAI revela que lanzará un dispositivo hardware relacionado con Codex el 15 de julio. Se muestra un dispositivo cuadrado con botones para accesos directos del editor de código IA.
bajada_en: OpenAI reveals it will launch a hardware device related to Codex on July 15th. A square device with buttons for quick access to AI code editor shortcuts is shown.

title: AI agents are not your “coworkers”
summary: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. Imagine coming in to work to learn that a new underling will report to you. The worker is not a person but an AI tool—one that your company nonetheless calls Alex, an…
title_es: Los agentes IA no son tus compañeros de trabajo
bajada: MIT Technology Review cuestiona la narrativa corporativa que presenta agentes IA como 'coworkers'. Análisis crítico sobre expectativas realistas y dinámicas laborales con IA.
bajada_en: MIT Technology Review questions the corporate narrative presenting AI agents as 'coworkers'. Critical analysis on realistic expectations and labor dynamics with AI.

title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
